overview: Dallas Regenerative & Anti-Aging offers evidence-based therapies including hormone therapy, peptides, sexual wellness, aesthetics, and hair restoration. Care is delivered through personalized treatment plans created by a team of medical professionals with over 20 years of combined experience.
highlights: Bioidentical hormone therapy (BHRT) with pellets and injectables
PRP therapies for hair restoration and sexual wellness
IV Therapy and aesthetic treatments including Botox, Dysport, and microneedling
targetAudience: Men and women seeking to improve their appearance and overall well-being through long-term solutions for age-related concerns.
